title: AnalysisSnapshot
description: Output of /overture:clarify. Problem understanding at a point in time. Ported from webapp's AnalysisSnapshot type (src/stores/types.ts:681).

version.description: Monotonic counter within a session. 0 = initial analysis, 1+ = deepening rounds.

real_question.description: The reframed question after surfacing hidden framing. NOT the user's surface request.

hidden_assumptions.description: Assumptions the user is making without stating. Each phrased as a declarative sentence.

skeleton.description: Bullet-level skeleton of what the final answer would contain. 3-7 bullets.

execution_plan.description: Steps for team deployment. Produced when real_question is clear enough to decompose.

insight.description: Key insight that emerged from this round of analysis. Present on deepening rounds.

framing_confidence.description: Self-assessed confidence that the reframed question is correct. <70 triggers framing validation.

framing_locked.description: User confirmed the reframing. Subsequent rounds cannot re-challenge.

convergence_score.description: Aggregate of question stability + assumption reduction. >=75 means ready to mix.

decision_line.description: A single sign-off-worthy decision sentence (Phase 1 typed question output).
